name: eod-report-ctx
description: End-of-day report using context-saver batch execution. Consolidates dashboard, services, events, and metrics into a single filtered response.

commands.intent: all services with status and health

steps.command: python3 scripts/ctx_session.py log --type eod_report --priority high --data '{"type": "eod", "completed": true}'

steps.comment: Save session state at end of day

steps.command: python3 scripts/notify.py send --to user --priority high --subject 'EOD Report' --body 'See pipeline output'
